programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness avfyrar Rob, Steelo and Lolo Wood lite Hala skott, tander brasor i Brand i skallen och bråkar om hur stokigt att ar i Sunkig karlek.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness går Rob, Steelo och Lolo Wood farligt nara kanten i Ingen kantkansla, kanner bowlingsmarta i Banovertradelser och behover stanga av konsolen i Spelvrede.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I det har avsnittet av Ridiculousness ska Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim och Lolo Wood forsoka undvika roliga fall i Flyktmissar, lara kanna hundar som ar lattpåverkade i Harmhundar och visa varfor skyddshjalmar ar så viktiga i Rakt uppifrån.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Aaliyah vantar på sin Instagrammodell Jaquan, en kille hon har dejtat i over ett år men aldrig traffat. Men nar Nev och Kamie borjar grava får de snart en misstanke att Aaliyah blir rejalt lurad.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Efter sju år vill Gemini desperat hitta Myranda. Men allt tar en ovantad vandning nar det ar Nev och Kamie som behover hjalp. Det ar dags for en intervention for en okand serieskojare.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: I det forsta virtuella avsnittet av Catfish hindras inte Nev och Kamie av karantanen nar de ska hjalpa Jason avsloja Insta-modellen Keiths hemligheter. Från sina hem slår de sina huvuden ihop for att få fram sanningen.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: I karantan får Nev och Kamie en forfrågan från Dre som vill hitta den gackande Casey. Men forfrågan ar så okonventionell och situationen blir så intensiv att duon inte vet om de borde gå vidare.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mitt i karantanen hjalper Nev och Kamie 24-årige Dustin få veta sanningen bakom hans åtta år långa natforhållande med Keegan. En chockerande upptackt tvingar Dustin att mota de senaste åtta årens storsta skrack.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Double Life
programme.desc: Quinton motte halvbrodern Teran som vuxen och de fick nara kontakt. Men Teran har borjat upptrada underligt. Så nu undrar Quinton: Är deras broderskap akta eller doljer Teran en mork hemlighet?

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Kates foraldrar har gett henne ett ultimatum: Gift dig med din pojkvan Patrick eller flytta hem till Ryssland. Men Patrick verkar ha egna planer.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.sub-title: Jag ar en ikon på tavlingsdansscenen
programme.desc: Alexis och Trenton traffades på tavlingsdansscenen. Men efter att ha sett hur nara Trenton har kommit sin nya protege undrar Alexis om Trenton bara ar vanskaplig eller om de ar tre nar de dansar nu.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.sub-title: My Man, My Man, My Man
programme.desc: Nunu trodde att hon hade funnit den perfekta partnern i Caleb, for henne och hennes två soner. Men senaste tidens forandringar i forhållandet och ett ickeexisterande sexliv får Nunu att ifrågasatta om Caleb verkligen ar hennes dromman.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Porceyon behover Tamis hjalp att ta reda på om hans fru Shamika verkligen saljer produkter i sina pop-up-butiker eller om hon traffar nån annan nar hon ar borta.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.desc: Ciara ar fullkomligt hangiven sin pojkvan Kwame Men en skiftning i Kwames attityd får henne att tvivla på hans engagemang.

programme.title: Caught In The Act: Unfaithful
programme.sub-title: Var ar min pizza och mitt vin?
programme.desc: Manliga modellen Marquis och hans pojkvan Arthur var varandras forsta och åtta år senare ar de fortfarande ihop. Men på senare tid har Marquis borjat misstanka att Arthur ar otrogen, så han kontaktar Tami for att få reda på om misstanken ar befogad.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I ett nytt avsnitt av Ridiculousness ger sig Rob, Steelo och Carly Aquilino ut på loparbanan och forsoker att inte bli Lopskadade, skrattar på egen risk i Farligt fniss och bokar flygbiljett for att uppleva Hemskheter i skyn.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: De tavlande måste soka i djupet av sin fantasi for att skapa hapnadsvackande masterverk med endast krita. Grudge Match fortsatter om 100 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Coacherna mots for att radda sina artister från att bli eliminerade. Sjojungfru-tatueringar tar grudge-matchen till havet. Kampen fortsatter om 100 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Tatuerarna stalls mot motståndarnas coach och nu testas deras finess. Kampen om 100 000 dollar och titeln Ink Master fortsatter..

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top Italian cooks Antonio Carluccio and Gennaro Contraldo are on a Road Trip around East Anglia. Restaurateurs, writers and old friends the ‘greedy Italians’ will be foraging for antiques in the company of experts David Harper and James Braxton. Watch out for some ‘explosive’ bargaining and an extremely tasty risotto! When he’s not shopping Antonio learns about the brave fisherman of Suffolk who saved mariners’ lives while risking their own. And, Gennaro has a trip to take a peek at a very special bird.

programme.title: We are Artists not Vandals
programme.desc: Follow the artists who dress the streets from the ground to the walls. In each episode, we will introduce you to one or several street artists who will make you discover their passion or their work for some. The street art is an artistic movement and a mode of expression, which asserts itself or claims so from the end of the 20th century. However, some people still find it difficult to consider it as a real art form. We will try to prove them wrong.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Edouard Manet.You will discover his labour with Lola de valence, Olympia, Eel and red mullet.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Paul Cezanne. You will discover his labour with his still-life, mill on the Couleuvre at Pontoise, Young girl with doll.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Dans la seconde moitie du 19ème siècle, Edouard Manet (1832-1883) demontre une grande originalite dans ses peintures à representation historique et ses portraits representant des figures connues, comme le romancier Zola et le poète Mallarme. Meme s’il n’est pas reconnu comme etant le premier impressionniste, sa place de leader dans l’histoire de l’art se doit d’etre souligne. Les scandales provoques en 1863 par « Le Dejeuner sur l’herbe » ou « Olympia » tout deux exposes au Musee dOrsay marque le debut de la peinture moderne.Bonne visite !

programme.title: We are Artists not Vandals
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous irons à la rencontre de Barny et Joko. Barny est un artiste de rue qui realise surtout ses œuvres à Montreuil ou dans le 13ème arrondissement de Paris. Il est autodidacte et a commence à developper son art d’abord dans les galeries, puis dans la rue pour parler à un public plus large et plus sensible à ses œuvres. Joko est un artiste autodidacte egalement. Il dessine et a toujours ete attire par la bande-dessinee, les comics de super-heros, puis par le street art.

programme.title: Parisian Street Art
programme.desc: Tiles, glue, a ladder. For nearly 30 years, Invader has been covering the world with his colorful pixelated creatures. From his first illegal installations to global success, this film looks back on the extraordinary journey of the most international of Parisian street artists. Between ancient and digital, geek references and pop culture, Invader has transformed spaces around the world and beyond into an unlimited playground. But it is in Paris, where it all began for him, that the anonymous artist most consistently demonstrates the extent of his creativity, from his first piece to his most recent large-scale installation. Rare interviews with the artist, previously unseen images, and expert analysis decode the system behind a living, complex body of work that, over the decades, has become as global as it is unique.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Narrated by Gillian Anderson, this episode of Exhibition on Screen follows the footsteps of French artists such as Renoir and Monet, the American Impressionist movement forged its own path. Painted over a period of 40 years, these paintings reveal the United States both as a nation and as a creative breeding ground. The history of this movement is closely linked to the love of gardens and the desire to preserve nature in a country undergoing rapid urbanization. This enchanting journey through workshops, gardens and famous sites in the USA, UK and France is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Origami
programme.desc: Origami is about the art of paper folding, a Japanese and Chinese millenary tradition. In modern usage, the word “origami” is used as an inclusive term for all paper folding, regardless of their cultural origin. Different folding and sculpting techniques, new models, bright colors – you’ll see all of this in our program! We will teach you how to transform a flat square sheet of paper into a finished sculpture – from simple to complex!

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: A fashion photographer, Anthony Barbozas ambition is also to fight against the discrimination suffered by black American professionals in this still very segregated environment. His works are now in many private collections or museums as "Nigila, NYC, 1973" acquired by the MoMa.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discuss with Pierre Terrasson, photographer. He is considered the rock, punk and new wave photographer of the 1980s, but not only. He started to get interested in photography at the age of 14-15 with his friends. He will tell us how he became a photographer and talk about his life, his career, and what made him famous.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the drawing and paper cut exhibition at the Rodin Museum. This exhibition brings together a hundred paper cut-outs and drawings of the artist. These artistic practices have accompanied him throughout his life. Among the works exhibited you will find drawings such as "The Mask of Minos" and many paper cut-outs representing bodies. But it should not be forgotten that Rodin was also a sculptor and you will be able to observe sculptures with Japanese influences such as the "face expressing fury".

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor and charmer Nigel Havers and his canny, deal-making chum (and ex-agent) Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. Travelling by Bentley and TVR, they’ll have £400 each and expert advice from Margie Cooper and James Braxton. But what will do best at the auction... Nigel’s old cockle bucket or Michael’s tambourine? Plus there’s a trip to see some Bristol Savages and bit of Georgian elegance with the story of ‘The King of Bath’.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Graffiti World
programme.desc: Graffiti World is a short program dedicated to contemporary urban art around the world. Each episode explores a specific city, highlighting iconic works of street art. Local soundscape accompanies the images for an authentic, commentary-free immersion. The program showcases the creativity and diversity of artistic expression in public spaces. An invitation to discover the richness of graffiti as an art form in its own right.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Claude Monet est probablement le peintre impressionniste le plus celèbre du mouvement. Le terme « impressionnisme » est notamment derive d’une de ses peintures « Impression, soleil levant » (1872). Cette exposition retrace les grandes etapes de la carrière prolifique de Monet tout en se concentrant sur les tableaux de ce maître de l’art à ne pas manquer comme : « La Gare Saint-Lazare », « Les Coquelicots », « Les Meules », « Serie des Cathedrales de Rouen » expose dans les 4 coins du monde comme au Musee des Beaux-arts de Boston et sans oublier « Les Nympheas » expose au musee de lOrangerie à Paris.Bonne visite !

programme.title: Sempe, cartoonist
programme.desc: Translated into twenty-five languages, Jean-Jacques SEMPÉ is also Frances most famous cartoonist. Over the past fifty years, he has touched every demographic and every generation.

programme.title: Vasarely, the illusionist
programme.desc: As a visual artist, painter and theorist, Vasarely was determined to challenge the art of the easel and develop an art form that was "in tune with the times" and aimed at the widest possible audience. In his quest for "functional" art, he wanted his new kinetic plastic art to help beautify the city and thereby transform society. Today, he remains the celebrated inventor of Op art.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: "All is but impression. The abundance of impressions that gush forth from lyric drama must still be supplemented by the impression of abundance that gushes forth from architecture." C. GarnierThe edifice designed by Charles Garnier is considered one of the jewels of 19th-century architecture. The variety and richness of the materials used earned it unprecedented enthusiasm from the moment it was inaugurated.

programme.title: When I grow up Ill be a photographer
programme.desc: Depuis leurs debuts jusquà lobtention de leur diplôme, leurs reves, leur evolution, ainsi que tous leurs secrets pour obtenir les plus beaux cliches vous seront devoiles. Epaules par leurs professeurs, de grands noms de la profession (Paolo Roversi, Dominique Isserman...) ces six etudiants aux niveaux et aux profils differents se battent tous pour atteindre le meme reve : devenir photographe professionnel.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we meet the photographer Greg Gorman. He has photographed and worked with many celebrities. According to him, the biggest part of the photographers job is to get inside peoples heads and break down the barrier that these people create around them. He looks back on his most beautiful shots of celebrities and their stories.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: David Hockney à la Royal Academy of Arts
programme.desc: David Hockney, generalement considere comme l’un des artistes britanniques les plus populaires, connaît un succès mondial grâce à ses expositions à Londres, New York, Paris et ailleurs qui attirent des millions de spectateurs. Devenu recemment octogenaire, Hockney ne semble pas avoir l’intention de lever le pied ni de perdre son audace legendaire. Ce film revèle des interviews intimes et inedites et se concentre sur deux expositions à succès ayant eu lieu en 2012 et 2016 à la Royal Academy of Arts Londres. Le realisateur Phil Grabsky a beneficie d’un accès privilegie pour celebrer sur grand ecran ce genie creatif du XXIe siècle.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private tour takes you to discover the "Calder-Picasso" exhibition at the Picasso National Museum in Paris. The works of Pablo Picasso and Alexander Calder are exhibited and respond to each other, offering a real experience to the viewer. You will discover sculptures such as "Woman in the Garden" or "Shark and Whale".

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Deux legendes de la comedie britannique, Ronni Ancona et Jan Ravens, sont accompagnees des antiquaires Phil Serrell et James Braxton pour ce Road Trip. Partant de la ville de Redcar, dans le North Yorkshire, ils se dirigent vers une vente aux enchères à Stockport, dans le Cheshire.Jan se laisse emporter et depense tout son budget, tandis que Ronni se regale dune paire de bottes en verre très kitsch.Lors dun detour, Jan decouvre pourquoi les habitants de Hartlepool pensaient quun singe etait un Français, et Ronni reste bouche bee lorsque Braxton enlève ses vetements. Sacre moment !

programme.title: Parisian Street Art
programme.desc: Tiles, glue, a ladder. For nearly 30 years, Invader has been covering the world with his colorful pixelated creatures. From his first illegal installations to global success, this film looks back on the extraordinary journey of the most international of Parisian street artists. Between ancient and digital, geek references and pop culture, Invader has transformed spaces around the world and beyond into an unlimited playground. But it is in Paris, where it all began for him, that the anonymous artist most consistently demonstrates the extent of his creativity, from his first piece to his most recent large-scale installation. Rare interviews with the artist, previously unseen images, and expert analysis decode the system behind a living, complex body of work that, over the decades, has become as global as it is unique.

programme.title: Art Poster in Paris Streets
programme.desc: At the end of the 19th century, illustrated posters turned Paris into an open-air museum. From Cheret to Toulouse-Lautrec, artists and audiences met in the streets. This film explores this graphic revolution and its impact on society and modernity.

programme.title: When I grow up Ill be a photographer
programme.desc: Depuis leurs debuts jusquà lobtention de leur diplôme, leurs reves, leur evolution, ainsi que tous leurs secrets pour obtenir les plus beaux cliches vous seront devoiles. Epaules par leurs professeurs, de grands noms de la profession (Paolo Roversi, Dominique Isserman...) ces six etudiants aux niveaux et aux profils differents se battent tous pour atteindre le meme reve : devenir photographe professionnel.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Built in 1926, the Bauhaus in Dessau remains Walter Gropiuss major work. One of the most famous buildings of 20th century architecture. Not only architect of the Bauhaus, he is also the director of this "School of Creation": the Bauhaus, both patron and client. It is the separate needs of the school that determine the design of the buildings, which are connected to each other. To each space its coherence, its own existence. Gropius opts for a nesting system: he designs an asymmetrical building, giving it a floating character, playing on different masses and different heights, advancing into space. As if in extension. The desire for transparency is omnipresent. The curtain wall of glass that clings to the three floors of the main parallelepiped is the most accomplished mark of it. The interior decoration is designed and built by the Bauhaus students. It is a total architecture for Gropius. Rationalizing construction, producing more economical and functional housing will remain the a.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Leonard à la National Gallery de Londres
programme.desc: Un evenement remarquable sest produit à la National Gallery de Londres lorsque la plus grande collection jamais constituee de peintures de Leonard de Vinci a ete reunie dans une exposition unique : Leonard de Vinci : peintre à la cour de Milan. Leonard est reconnu comme etant peut-etre le plus grand peintre et sculpteur de tous les temps, mais ses talents ne sarretaient pas là. Ce film raconte sa vie et setend sur Leonard le visionnaire, Leonard linventeur. Depuis lendroit où il a vecu ses dernières annees au Château du Clos Luce en France, nous verrons que Leonard de Vinci etait peut-etre lincarnation meme de lesprit de la Renaissance.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Between 1883 and 1926 Claude Monet lived in a house at Giverny where he created a flower garden and a water garden, which provided the inspiration for his series of paintings known as the “Water Lilies”. The “Water-Lily Pond” portrays this garden, with its water lilies and the Japanese bridge in the background. In the series of eight large canvases on the theme, housed in the Musee de l’Orangerie in Paris, Monet introduces variations in light according to the hour of the day.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Architects furniture, 1960-2020" at the Cite de lArchitecture et du Patrimoine in Paris. Why do architects still design furniture today, while designers have taken over the real estate market, lighting...? You will have the answer in this private tour and you will discover furniture of architects such as Nemo.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Lhumoriste et animateur Jim Moir et sa femme Nancy Sorrell partent en road trip dans le Kent aujourdhui.Mieux connu sous le nom de Vic Reeves, Jim apporte sa touche dhumour unique à lachat dantiquites. De son côte, Nancy, mannequin et presentatrice tele, sait aussi marchander et elle est très competitive ! Le couple est accompagne par les experts Charlie Ross et Thomas Plant.Soyez attentif au don surprenant de Jim pour deviner l’âge de presque tout, à Dixon traversant les chutes du Niagara et à une leçon de navigation par longitude.Et surtout, la mysterieuse Mme Parker fera-t-elle son apparition à la vente aux enchères ?

programme.title: We are Artists not Vandals
programme.desc: Follow the artists who dress the streets from the ground to the walls. In each episode, we will introduce you to one or several street artists who will make you discover their passion or their work for some. The street art is an artistic movement and a mode of expression, which asserts itself or claims so from the end of the 20th century. However, some people still find it difficult to consider it as a real art form. We will try to prove them wrong.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: Dans cet episode, nous nous interesserons à l’artiste Robert Combas. Sa peinture est faite de libertes : elle parle de la societe, de la violence, de la sexualite, de la souffrance des gens, de leurs petits bonheurs, de leur petitesse, de leur grandeur… Il s’inspire du rock dont il est un fin amateur, des images populaires des livres d’enfance, des manuels scolaires, et de tout ce qui fait une culture populaire accessible à tous.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a French painter, Auguste Renoir. You will discover his labour with Girls at the piano, The Bathers, still-life with apples and pears.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of an Italian painter, Raphaël. You will discover his labour with Spozalizio, The virgin and child with St John the Baptist or portrait of Baldassare Castiglione.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Le rockeur progressif Rick Wakeman et son grand ami Ian Lavender, celèbre pour son rôle de Pike dans Dad’s Army, s’offrent une joyeuse viree sur les routes secondaires du Norfolk. Accompagnes des experts Raj Bisram et David Harper, ces deux chasseurs d’antiquites sillonnent le comte à la recherche de tresors à vendre aux enchères à Nottingham.Rick decouvre d’anciens graffitis medievaux caches dans la cathedrale de Norwich, tandis qu’Ian fait un detour vers le nord du Norfolk pour admirer la plus grande collection de soldats miniatures au monde.Mais un sage vieil homme japonais aidera-t-il Ian à triompher aux enchères ?

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Ne à Aix-en-Provence dans le Sud de la France, Paul Cezanne (1839-1906) etait un grand peintre français lors de la deuxième moitie du 19ème siècle. Artiste de base impressionniste, il initie le post-impressionnisme et le cubisme à travers ses oeuvres. Dans ses natures mortes et ses « Baigneurs », il innove grâce aux formes geometriques, permettant d’influencer les artistes cubistes qui le succèdent. Il a choisi de peindre la « Montagne Sainte-Victoire » une vingtaine de fois. Remarquez la magnifique simplicite de l’oeuvre « Nature morte aux pommes et aux oranges » ou la concentration illustre dans « Les Joueurs de cartes » tout deux exposes au Musee dOrsay.Bonne visite !

programme.title: We are Artists not Vandals
programme.desc: Follow the artists who dress the streets from the ground to the walls. In each episode, we will introduce you to one or several street artists who will make you discover their passion or their work for some. The street art is an artistic movement and a mode of expression, which asserts itself or claims so from the end of the 20th century. However, some people still find it difficult to consider it as a real art form. We will try to prove them wrong.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: Après 7 ans de grands travaux, le château de Chinon rouvre ses portes aux visiteurs. Cette forteresse royale est un haut lieu de l’histoire europeenne. C’est au cœur de la guerre de Cent ans que Jeanne D’arc à rencontrer Charles VII dans le château de Chinon. Les travaux acheves, la forteresse royale de Chinon offre un parcours de visite surprenant qui propose de nombreux dispositifs interactifs. Les logis royaux restaures accueillent un parcours spectaculaire. Des films sont projetes de manière originale et novatrice dans quatre salles dites « d’immersion ». Avec plus de 5 millions de visiteurs annuels qui genèrent des milliers d’emplois permanents, les châteaux de la Loire sont un pôle historique, attractif et perenne classe par l’UNESCO.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: The spectacular sculptures and paintings of Michelangelo seem so familiar to us, but what do we really know about this renaissance genius? Who was this ambitious and passionate man? A virtuoso craftsman, Michelangelo’s artistry is evident in everything he touched. Beautiful and diverse works such as the towering statue of David, the deeply moving Pietà in the Papal Basilica of St. Peter and his tour-de-force, the Sistine Chapel ceiling still leave us breathless today.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Origami
programme.desc: Origami is about the art of paper folding, a Japanese and Chinese millenary tradition. In modern usage, the word “origami” is used as an inclusive term for all paper folding, regardless of their cultural origin. Different folding and sculpting techniques, new models, bright colors – you’ll see all of this in our program! We will teach you how to transform a flat square sheet of paper into a finished sculpture – from simple to complex!

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In this episode, we will meet Lurent Vu, photo reporter. He was born in Nice in 1977, and moved to Paris to study photography. During this period he did an internship at Studio Harcourt, then at Sipa Press, where he still works. He has a taste for portraiture, but also for reportage and journalism.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the retrospective "Tutto Ponti" which retraces 60 years of the career of the architect-designer Gio Ponti at the decorative arts museum. This is the first retrospective devoted to this Italian artist. You will discover his ceramic works from the beginning of his career, but also the furniture designs anchored in his poetic and subtle universe.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Les chefs televises Aldo Zilli et Ching He-Huang s’affrontent lors de ce Road Trip à travers le sud-est de l’Angleterre, accompagnes des experts Natasha Raskin et Paul Laidlaw.Aldo mise sur une bague en or malgre les conseils des experts, tandis que Ching espère que des antiquites d’origine orientale feront un beau score aux enchères dans le nord de Londres.En chemin, Aldo fait une halte pour rencontrer Jill, une doyenne de 200 ans qui fournissait autrefois la population en farine. De son côte, l’amoureuse des animaux Ching decouvre l’histoire d’un homme qui, au XIXe siècle, a risque le ridicule et la ruine pour proteger le betail.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Each episode focuses on a specific subject:movement, oil painting, shadows, hair... For the first 10 minutes, each artist gives a theoretical lesson illustrated by sketches. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: Graffiti World
programme.desc: Graffiti World is a short program dedicated to contemporary urban art around the world. Each episode explores a specific city, highlighting iconic works of street art. Local soundscape accompanies the images for an authentic, commentary-free immersion. The program showcases the creativity and diversity of artistic expression in public spaces. An invitation to discover the richness of graffiti as an art form in its own right.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: With his considerable production of more than 6,000 works, Auguste Renoir took part in the emergence of the impressionist movement even if he were to distance himself from it later to assert a more personal style. This visit begins with his most famous masterpiece, the “Ball at the Moulin de la Galette”. You will also rediscover the “Dance in the City” and the “Piano Lesson” exposed at the Joslyn art museum as well as “Claude Renoir in Clown Costume”, a portrait of his son who was later to become one of France’s greatest film directors exposed at the Orangerie Museum in France Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Parisian Street Art
programme.desc: Tiles, glue, a ladder. For nearly 30 years, Invader has been covering the world with his colorful pixelated creatures. From his first illegal installations to global success, this film looks back on the extraordinary journey of the most international of Parisian street artists. Between ancient and digital, geek references and pop culture, Invader has transformed spaces around the world and beyond into an unlimited playground. But it is in Paris, where it all began for him, that the anonymous artist most consistently demonstrates the extent of his creativity, from his first piece to his most recent large-scale installation. Rare interviews with the artist, previously unseen images, and expert analysis decode the system behind a living, complex body of work that, over the decades, has become as global as it is unique.

programme.title: Art Poster in Paris Streets
programme.desc: At the end of the 19th century, illustrated posters turned Paris into an open-air museum. From Cheret to Toulouse-Lautrec, artists and audiences met in the streets. This film explores this graphic revolution and its impact on society and modernity.

programme.title: Artists Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artists workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Cet episode presente les Thermes de Vals-les-Bains, un chef-dœuvre architectural conçu par Peter Zumthor. Larchitecte a reinvente lidee traditionnelle du bain en integrant de manière harmonieuse leau et la pierre dans un dialogue poetique. Il a utilise du quartzite local pour ancrer le bâtiment dans son environnement naturel, creant une atmosphère de calme et de serenite. Innovant pour son epoque, Zumthor a mis en scène leau dans tous ses etats – du ruissellement au brouillard – pour offrir une experience multisensorielle unique. Ce projet est un exemple exceptionnel de l’architecture minimaliste, combinant simplicite, fonctionnalite et une profonde connexion à la nature.

programme.title: When I grow up Ill be a photographer
programme.desc: Depuis leurs debuts jusquà lobtention de leur diplôme, leurs reves, leur evolution, ainsi que tous leurs secrets pour obtenir les plus beaux cliches vous seront devoiles. Epaules par leurs professeurs, de grands noms de la profession (Paolo Roversi, Dominique Isserman...) ces six etudiants aux niveaux et aux profils differents se battent tous pour atteindre le meme reve : devenir photographe professionnel.

programme.title: The decisive moment
programme.desc: In each episode of the decisive moment, we welcome a photographer whom we have asked to select three photos that have marked their life and their career. Whether they are reporters, portraitists or fashion photographers, they all have the same passion and will share it with us.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: En juin 2017, une grande exposition a ouvert à Paris au musee d’Orsay. Pour la première fois, cette exposition a reuni tous les portraits de Cezanne. Cela a ete l’occasion d’analyser l’œuvre de Cezanne à l’aide d’experts internationaux et de parcourir les salles de la National Portrait Gallery de Londres et de la National Gallery of Art de Washington.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. Then they each start working on their creation. Finally, they end with a debrief, comparingand explaining their techniques.

programme.title: My little Museum
programme.desc: My little Museum is Art History retold through funny anecdotes and backstage trivias by Alicia Flipo. With her wacky demeanor, her inventiveness and her quirky sense of humor, Alicia stages these small Art tales so that once and for all, you could remember the Big stories!

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: Print in Bruegels Time at BOZAR in Brussels
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to the discovery of the exhibition "the print at the time of Bruegel" at BOZAR in Brussels. Here you can discover the rich collection of the Royal Library of Belgium. It is possible to observe prints of the artist Pietr Bruegel, but also of other artists of the 16th century.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Licône de la pop et actrice Claire Grogan retrouve son compatriote de Glasgow, l’acteur Alex Norton de Taggart, pour une quete de tresors antiques lucratifs. Anita Manning et Paul Laidlaw sont là pour leur prodiguer leurs conseils d’experts.Anita et Alex se retrouvent embarques dans un Boat Trip dantiquites, evoquant leurs souvenirs denfance sur le Clyde. Pendant ce temps, Claire et Paul decouvrent de près à quoi ressemblait le château de Stirling au XVIe siècle.Le resultat de la vente aux enchères à Ayr dependra d’une dame nue.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: Après 7 ans de grands travaux, le château de Chinon rouvre ses portes aux visiteurs. Cette forteresse royale est un haut lieu de l’histoire europeenne. C’est au cœur de la guerre de Cent ans que Jeanne D’arc à rencontrer Charles VII dans le château de Chinon. Les travaux acheves, la forteresse royale de Chinon offre un parcours de visite surprenant qui propose de nombreux dispositifs interactifs. Les logis royaux restaures accueillent un parcours spectaculaire. Des films sont projetes de manière originale et novatrice dans quatre salles dites « d’immersion ». Avec plus de 5 millions de visiteurs annuels qui genèrent des milliers d’emplois permanents, les châteaux de la Loire sont un pôle historique, attractif et perenne classe par l’UNESCO.

programme.title: The Chateaux of France, Living Splendors
programme.desc: Le château de Saumur est perche sur un tertre qui surplombe la ville. Ses hautes tours chapeautees et sevères dominent la Loire et ses remparts creneles abritent toute l’histoire du dernier millenaire : dix siècles de guerre et de paix. Aujourd’hui, la demesure de cette fantasmagorie de pierres est au cœur d’une logique sociale, economique, et touristique. Passant d’un bord à l’autre de ces deux mondes qui se frequentent et s’interpenètrent surtout à l’occasion des fetes medievales et des spectacles de cavalerie, le château de Saumur est un monument-phare de la cite, un pivot de la fierte commune qui favorise les rencontres conviviales et le developpement de toute une economie touristique.

programme.title: When I grow up Ill be a photographer
programme.desc: Depuis leurs debuts jusquà lobtention de leur diplôme, leurs reves, leur evolution, ainsi que tous leurs secrets pour obtenir les plus beaux cliches vous seront devoiles. Epaules par leurs professeurs, de grands noms de la profession (Paolo Roversi, Dominique Isserman...) ces six etudiants aux niveaux et aux profils differents se battent tous pour atteindre le meme reve : devenir photographe professionnel.

programme.title: Architectures
programme.desc: Le bâtiment de la Caisse dÉpargne de Vienne, œuvre de larchitecte Otto Wagner, est un exemple emblematique de lArt nouveau viennois. Construit entre 1904 et 1912, il se distingue par son design fonctionnel et son utilisation de materiaux modernes comme le verre et lacier. La façade, epuree et ornee de motifs geometriques, reflète la volonte de Wagner dallier esthetisme et utilite. Linterieur est egalement innovant avec ses vastes espaces ouverts, conçus pour ameliorer la ventilation et la circulation de la lumière naturelle. Ce bâtiment represente une synthèse entre tradition et modernite, posant les bases de larchitecture moderne europeenne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Cette exposition très attendue à la Royal Academy of Arts etait la toute première retrospective consacree au portrait dÉdouard Manet. Couvrant lensemble de la carrière de cet artiste enigmatique et parfois controverse, lexposition a rassemble des œuvres provenant dEurope, dAsie et des États-Unis. Le portrait de Manet na jamais fait lobjet dune exposition, bien quil represente environ la moitie de sa production artistique. Il a peint sa famille, ses amis et les personnalites litteraires, politiques et artistiques de lepoque, donnant vie non seulement à ses sujets mais aussi à la societe parisienne.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: A key artist of the Italian Renaissance, Raffaello Santi (1483-1520) developed a classical art form, based on drawing, which made him the model for many painters in the following centuries. His favourite theme was the Madonna: you can admire, for example, “The Sistine Madonna” in Dresden and the “The Virgin and Child with St John the Baptist” in the Louvre. Notice the gentle harmony and the delicate sensuality in “The Three Graces” or the powerful human presence in “The Portrait of Baldassare Castiglione”.Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.sub-title: A landscape of excellence, three figures of French architecture
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "A landscape of excellence, three figures of French architecture" at the Cite de lArchitecture and du Patrimoine in Paris. This exhibition offers a journey through contemporary creation. Since the 90s, three figures of French architecture have marked the history of art, Frederic Borel, Marc Barani and Jean-Marc Ibos and Myrto Vitart. They have shown the excellence of French creations in the world.

programme.title: Sketchbook
programme.desc: Raphael Federici (street artist), Marine Goodmorning (illustrator), Luca Fiore (cartoonist) and Harry Boudchicha (drawing teacher) reveal their best drawing techniques. programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing’s Zoe Ball and Ian Waite are quickstepping their way across the south West of England in a bid to turn a profit at auction in Hampshire. Experts Margie Cooper and Paul Laidlaw are on hand to guide. Paul shares a secret with Zoe about buying antique hair brushes. Ian, though, offers dancing lessons to dealers to secure a discount. Lordy! Zoe also hears how one village became world famous for lace production while Ian ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: We are Artists not Vandals
programme.desc: Follow the artists who dress the streets from the ground to the walls. programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Franco-Danish painter, Camille Pissarro. You will discover his labour with View from Louveciennes, A path through the fields, Pontoise or Peasant girl making a fire.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loue, its capon and many other regional specialities. Lets go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Now its Freds turn, a 35-year-old from Liège, to enter the competition. Underneath his serene exterior, this young educator for children with a passion for decoration hides a very speedy temperament. And to make the most of his hyperactivity, theres only one solution: decorating. Fred knows what he wants, both in his decorating style and in life.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its verdict time for Kenelm, Aurelie, Virginie and Fred. Our budding decorators are about to find out their opponents criticisms and receive their scores. What will the owners think of their freshly redecorated room? Who will be Valerie Damidots favorite? Who will walk away with the title of Deco Master and €2,000?

programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Open and Ground: Stretch Your Shoulders and Strengthen Your Upper Back
programme.desc: A dynamic sequence for your upper body, Open and Ground will work your torso with a series of restorative and heart opening poses. By keeping a steady connection to the earth and lifting and opening the chest, the experience of opposing forces can be fully explored.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, the team invites you to a 100% chair-based session! Sabrina leads you through gentle but effective exercises that activate the whole body. Starting seated with a full warm-up, you’ll flow through varied moves — all with a chair. The vibe is light, friendly, and fun, making it easy to stay motivated. It’s the perfect routine for all levels, even in small spaces.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Recharge and Revitalize: Hip and Shoulder Opening
programme.desc: Allow your breath to be bigger than the movements of your body in this invigorating sequence. All other instructions are secondary, as this sequence calls on you to use your breath as the only mediator between mind and body. Use this steady rhythm to inform your every moment of your life and practice.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: For the fourth day of competition, its Anouchka, from Rhode-Saint-Genèse, who enters the arena. For as long as she can remember, decorating has been part of the life of this bubbly 45-year-old mum. A few years ago, Anouchka turned to painting and jewellery design. Professions that bring her closer to interior design, her real passion. To prove it she’ll have to stand out from the crowd. And what is our decorators trademark?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loue, its capon and many other regional specialities. Lets go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpente le pays de Blaye, visite deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arreter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour decouvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelee « Cite du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour decouvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus recents de cette ville chargee d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Aujourdhui, cest au tour dEmmanuele, un Montois de 29 ans, de relever le defi. Ce gerant dune boutique vintage a un style bien à lui. Pour Emmanuele, le secret dune bonne deco se cache dans la precision. Voyons comment ce perfectionniste à l’extreme s’en sort avec notre thème “jungle urbaine”.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Tendre et savoureux, l’agneau tient une place preponderante dans la cuisine festive mais aussi dans celle de tous les jours. Du Pays Basque au Cotentin en passant par Paris, Julie part donc sur les routes de France à la decouverte des differentes races et types delevage existant à travers le pays. Il faut dire que la France a lune des productions les plus variees au monde. Il existe plus dune quarantaine de races repertoriees en 5 categories : precoces, d’herbage, rustiques, merinos et laitières. Mais plus qu’à la race, c’est à la façon dont ils sont alimentes qui interesse les fins connaisseurs. Julie nous fait decouvrir ses producteurs et cuisiniers de ce met raffine !

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C’est à nouveau sur les routes de France que l’on retrouve aujourd’hui Julie pour parler d’un produit incontournable des tables françaises : le fromage. Plus qu’un engouement gourmand, plus qu’une friandise de fins de repas, le fromage est associe à l’image de la gastronomie française, et d’ailleurs reconnu patrimoine immateriel par l’UNESCO. Les français ne s’y sont pas trompes : avec près de 1 000 varietes - des pâtes molles, aux pâtes cuites, persillees, ou encore pressees, et avec 45 Appellations, nous sommes les plus gros consommateurs de fromage au monde !

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo met lavocat à lhonneur, ce fruit originaire du Mexique qui presente de nombreux bienfaits pour notre sante. Elle nous propose une recette de gambas à la puree de concombres et avocats, ainsi quune panna cotta à lavocat accompagnee de sa salade de fraises.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Les aperos improvises, ce n’est pas toujours facile. Quand les amis debarquent sans prevenir, le stress peut vite monter. Pas de panique, Luana Belmondo et Thomas Clouet, grand specialiste en la matière, improvisent un apero au pied leve avec trois fois rien. Des macarons de champignons, un mini tartare de bœuf, et le tour est joue !

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Canada is the second largest country in the world by land mass and contains amazing natural resources: 7% of the Earth’s drinking water is spread over the country’s thousands of lakes. Forests cover 45% of the territory. Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes off to discover these resources with those whose job it is to protect them. He takes a look at the ecological balance sheet of the world’s eighth-largest economic power.

programme.title: My Zen People
programme.desc: For many years, Andrew was a successful American child-actor on the popular show My Wife and Kids, until he dropped everything and embarked on a journey to find life’s true meaning. He now lives in Bali where he coaches people from all over the world on how to radically transform their diets. His 360° transformative journey includes meditation, yoga and nutrition.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Open and Ground: Stretch Your Shoulders and Strengthen Your Upper Back
programme.desc: A dynamic sequence for your upper body, Open and Ground will work your torso with a series of restorative and heart opening poses. By keeping a steady connection to the earth and lifting and opening the chest, the experience of opposing forces can be fully explored.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If youre a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brevonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, well explore the Libournais region, where well uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, well arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Wellness cuisine is not synonymous with sadness and insipidity. It can be extremely gourmet, for a balanced way to indulge yourself. On this theme, Luana welcomes young wellness pastry chef Johanna Le Pape. Together, they will prepare recipes that are both tasty and perfectly balanced: corn pizza with vegetables and peach-cassis and verbena puffs...

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Leftovers often end up in the garbage can. But with a little thought, its easy to recycle them. This ecological and economical gesture can even delight our taste buds. Like us, Luana Belmondo hates throwing things away. She knows all about waste-free cooking and has mastered the art. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Who will be the next great baker?
programme.desc: Le buffet de prestige est l’epreuve incontournable de la grande finale de la competition. Cette annee, elle prend une tournure exceptionnelle. Guillaume Gomez, chef des cuisines de l’Elysee, a souhaite confier aux finalistes la realisation des buffets de la Journee de la pâtisserie organisee par le palais presidentiel en l’honneur de la profession. Recevant laide de deux commis, les jeunes talents ont cinq heures pour relever ce defi et faire honneur aux plus grands noms de la pâtisserie française presents pour l’occasion. Puis, on connaîtra celui ou celle qui succedera à Audrey et Ophelie, gagnantes des deux precedentes editions de ce concours appetissant. Leurs recettes ont ete editees dans deux beaux ouvrages.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Virginie, a 54-year-old woman from Nantes, is brimming with ideas, and shes determined to prove that shes the Deco Master! Her brain is constantly bubbling. In fact, her explosive temperament prompted Virginie to quit her previous job to concentrate on her passion. While her new career forces her to think in terms of organization rather than decoration, this doesnt stop Virginie from having a very assertive style, and Virginie has more than one string to her bow.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today in Amiens, 35-year-old Aurelie enters the competition. Behind her apparent calm, she hides a volcano of inventiveness just waiting to explode. Her creativity is so overflowing that seven years ago, she quit her job as a laboratory technician to devote herself entirely to selling home-made decorative objects online. All homemade, but with a very particular style.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Now its Freds turn, a 35-year-old from Liège, to enter the competition. Underneath his serene exterior, this young educator for children with a passion for decoration hides a very speedy temperament. And to make the most of his hyperactivity, theres only one solution: decorating. Fred knows what he wants, both in his decorating style and in life.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Its verdict time for Kenelm, Aurelie, Virginie and Fred. Our budding decorators are about to find out their opponents criticisms and receive their scores. What will the owners think of their freshly redecorated room? Who will be Valerie Damidots favorite? Who will walk away with the title of Deco Master and €2,000?

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Stabilize and Center: Strengthen Your Core and Open Your Hips
programme.desc: Stabilize and Center allows for the creation of a deeper connection with your core, as well as the present moment. Through the practice of conscious breathing, movement and attention to the postures, a state of centered awareness can be cultivated.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, Guillaume and Sabrina guide you through a complete lower-body strengthening session. After a warm-up, they move on to targeted exercises for the thighs, abs, and glutes. Squats, lunges, and lateral raises are on the program to build strength and tone your body.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Core Connection: Strengthen Your Center to Cultivate Core and Balance
programme.desc: A bold sequence, Core Connection uses confident poses to help you embrace your inner strength and let go of any tensions you might encounter. Use this balancing sequence to cultivate peace of mind, even through awkward or challenging situations.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: One at a time, Cedric, Anouchka, Mickaël and Melissa went to a private home to redecorate a room based on the theme “like a garden”. This week, Valerie Damidot gave them the challenge of redecorating a living room to include the set object: A footstool! Today, its time for the verdict. All four projects have been completed. The contestants will now face their opponents criticisms.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Aujourdhui cest sur la route des champignons que Julie nous embarque. Rien de mieux pour occuper ses week-ends qu’une balade en foret à la recherche de champignons comestibles. Certaines espèces, comme le cèpe ou la girolle, se conservent très bien au congelateur ou, pour les plus patients, en bocaux. Nous aurons egalement loccasion de rencontrer deux Chefs passionnes par les champignons, devenus des specialistes du sujet : Franck Quinton et Regis Marcon. Mais pour l’instant on prend la route, à la decouverte de plats typiquement français avec d’etonnants champignons de Paris en Touraine, des morilles dans le Jura, des cèpes en Gironde, des russules charbonnières en Normandie et des coulemelles en Auvergne !

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: La semaine touche à sa fin. Celine, Aurelie, Gaëtan et Emmanuele vont faire face aux critiques de leurs adversaires. Mais surtout, les proprietaires vont enfin rentrer chez eux et decouvrir leur pièce entièrement redecoree. Que penseront-ils de leur nouvel interieur ? Quels points vont-ils attribuer ? Car leurs notes peuvent tout faire basculer et renverser le classement actuel. Qui remportera la competition ? Qui repartira avec les 2000 € et le titre d’As de la deco de la semaine ?

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrenees Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte dAzur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While were all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. She shows us how to reinvent boiled or steamed potatoes as something other than mashed potatoes. On the program: potato souffle with paprika and vegetable gratin with curry.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: Canada is the second largest country in the world by land mass and contains amazing natural resources: 7% of the Earth’s drinking water is spread over the country’s thousands of lakes. Forests cover 45% of the territory. Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes off to discover these resources with those whose job it is to protect them. He takes a look at the ecological balance sheet of the world’s eighth-largest economic power.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.desc: To better understand the role of these explosive mountains located all over the world, on land or under the sea, Yann Arthus-Bertrand goes to Italy, the country with the most active volcanoes in Europe. Accompanied by volcano expert Jacques-Marie Bardintzeff, the photographer meets those people who have chosen to live with « their » volcano, in spite of the dangers involved in this kind of proximity.

programme.title: My Zen People
programme.desc: For many years, Andrew was a successful American child-actor on the popular show My Wife and Kids, until he dropped everything and embarked on a journey to find life’s true meaning. He now lives in Bali where he coaches people from all over the world on how to radically transform their diets. His 360° transformative journey includes meditation, yoga and nutrition.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: In this episode of Home Training, Guillaume and Sabrina guide you through a complete lower-body strengthening session. After a warm-up, they move on to targeted exercises for the thighs, abs, and glutes. Squats, lunges, and lateral raises are on the program to build strength and tone your body.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Stabilize and Center: Strengthen Your Core and Open Your Hips
programme.desc: Stabilize and Center allows for the creation of a deeper connection with your core, as well as the present moment. Through the practice of conscious breathing, movement and attention to the postures, a state of centered awareness can be cultivated.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but its not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Betises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Julies Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Eating flowers might appear unconventional, but we often consume them without even realizing it. Consider artichokes, for instance : they are essentially large, unopened flowers. Capers are the preserved buds of flowers soaked in vinegar, and cloves are dried flower buds. We also find courgette flowers, saffron pistils, orange blossom water used to flavor pastries, and the violet sweets that evoke memories of our childhood. In addition to adding aesthetic appeal and providing a dose of vitamins to our plates, flowers elevate the flavors of a dish and can even serve as a vegetable substitute.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: A good breakfast is a healthy, balanced meal made up of 5 energy-giving elements: protein, fiber, carbohydrates, healthy fats and hydration. Luana Belmondo offers us a healthy breakfast that will satisfy both salty and sweet palates: oatmeal, avocado and salmon, buddha bowl with chia seeds and seasonal fruit, and vegan panacakes.

programme.title: Luanas Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her Italian friend Alessandra Pierini are preparing a pasta party. Theyll be cooking pesto and sharing their tips on how to get it right. Theyll also be making pasta saporita, full of color and flavor!

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: New Zealand - The Blue Mind Part II
programme.desc: Were still in New Zealand, where we look at the scientific and emotional benefits of water, illustrated by therapeutic surfing experiences and the Maori peoples ancestral connection with aquatic environments. From mental well-being to physical health, we discover how New Zealands abundant waters are more than just a natural spectacle; theyre a source of holistic health and well-being.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: India - The Search for Mindfulness Part I
programme.desc: We journey to India, a land revered for its ancient spiritual wisdom and practices. From the tranquil valleys of Kullu Manali in the Himalayas to the vibrant, bustling streets of Delhi, we explore the multifaceted world of mindfulness, meditation, and yoga. As we navigate through contrasting environments, we discover how meditation is part of daily life, offering invaluable lessons about finding inner tranquility amid external chaos. We also delve into the transformative impact of mindfulness on underprivileged children, highlighting how these ancient practices empower young lives. Rooted in Indias rich cultural heritage, the episode reveals how the nations spiritual traditions provide both sanctuary and a deeper connection to ourselves and the broader world. Join us for this enlightening expedition as we unravel the power of mindfulness and how we can incorporate it into our daily lives no matter where we live.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In our season premiere we tackle the riveting question: How is it that some people have been able to reach the pinnacle of our human performance? Guided by Dr. David Behm, an expert in sports physiology, we venture into the lab to uncover the fascinating intersection of science and athletic performance. Then we take this theoretical knowledge into the real world, visiting a high-performance training facility where professional NHL athletes are honing their skills. There, we join forces with Ben Prentiss, founder of Prentiss Hockey Performance, to not only witness these athletes in action but also to understand how the principles of peak performance can translate into our daily lives for enhanced strength and well-being. We hear from the athletes themselves including Stanley Cup Champions and All-Star players about their philosophy on what health means to them. This episode offers an insiders look into the world of elite training, demystifying the science and practices that enable ath.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: New Zealand - The Blue Mind Part I
programme.desc: In this episode set in scenic New Zealand, we explore the deep-rooted question: Does being near or in water actually improve our health? Guided by Dr. Wallace J. Nichols, author of "The Blue Mind," we delve into the scientific and emotional benefits of water, exemplified by therapeutic surfing experiences and the Maori peoples ancestral connection to aquatic environments. From mental well-being to physical health, we uncover how New Zealands abundant waters serve as more than just a natural spectacle; they are a source of holistic health and well-being. Along the way, Dr. Nichols introduces the concept of a "bluescription," a personalized prescription for water-based activities, inviting viewers to tap into the transformative power of water in their own lives.

programme.title: The Great Gardening Challenge
programme.desc: Its final time as the competition reaches its climax with just two pairs of professional garden designers remaining. It’s a battle of the relative new kids on the block as Millie Souter and Max Parker-Smith take on Tamara Bridge and Kate Savill. Both pairs wowed the judges with their designs and planting in the previous round but now they take on their toughest challenge yet as they compete for the crown. They have to create show gardens at one of the World’s greatest gardens, RHS Wisley Gardens in Surrey, for a budget of £10,000. With a brief set by the gardens curator they’ll need to take their designs to the next level if their want to win, and they’ve only got 48 hours to complete them. Adding to the pressure the weather is also against them.

programme.title: Snøleopard i Afghanistan
programme.desc: Forskere prøver å fange, merke og studere den sky og vakre snøleoparden til tross for at dens leveområde er del av en krigssone.

programme.title: Snodige skapninger
programme.desc: Lucy Cooke er i regnskogen på Borneo i jakten på neseapen. Hun undersøker også hvorfor apen ser så merkelig ut.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: I en verden fylt med dyktige rovdyr har evolusjonen bevæpnet en håndfull drapsmaskiner med et virkelig livsfarlig våpen. Tre inn i pelikanålens verden. Disse dyrene slår til lynraskt, og sluker byttet helt. Gabonviperen har store hoggtenner og angriper raskest av alle slanger. Valseedderkoppen river i stykker intetanende innsekter, og murenene skjuler sitt hemmelige våpen langt nede i halsen.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Noen av verdens underligste skapninger ligger skjult dypt under bakken, der evolusjonen har bevæpnet dem med ferdigheter som forkledning og forledning for å overleve. I denne mørke, kvelende underverdenen skyter en mark frem fra havbunnen for å fange fisk i sin gjørmete felle, en bille graver dypt i våt avføring og en liten graver lager milevis med tuneller med tennene.

programme.title: Hvitulvens rike
programme.desc: Vinteren nærmer seg og flokken starter jakten, men en mystisk forsvinning byr på en stor utfordring.

programme.title: Villmarkens utfordringer
programme.desc: Når man har alt, hvorfor skulle man gi slipp på det? En forventer at dyr velger den enkleste og sikreste måten for å sikre seg mat, trygghet og ly.

programme.title: Race to Winter
programme.desc: Når vårens første lys glir over fjordene, skogene, fjellene og tundraen, starter den store oppvåkningen. Brunbjørnmødrene kommer ut av vinterdvalen, og leder ungene sine ut i en helt ny verden. Lundefuglene gjenforenes med sine livspartnere, og isbjørnene vandrer rundt på den smeltende isen. Men de har lite tid - skyggen av vinteren lurer. Og I dette uendelige løpet mot kulden er det kun de mest motstandsdyktige som klarer seg.

programme.title: Villmarkens utfordringer
programme.desc: Christmasrødkrabben bor på landjorden, men den har sterke bånd til havet - det eneste stedet de kan føde.

programme.title: Villmarkens utfordringer
programme.desc: Er ikke kjærligheten vakker? For mange ville dyr er det å tiltrekke seg en partner for å pare seg en blodig kamp.

programme.title: Race to Winter
programme.desc: Når vårens første lys glir over fjordene, skogene, fjellene og tundraen, starter den store oppvåkningen. programme.title: Close Encounters of the Wild Kind
programme.desc: Horder av besøkende flokker seg utendørs for å bli ett med naturen, men noen ganger slår naturen tilbake, med klør eller tenner. Ville dyr nøler ikke med å minne besøkende på at dette er deres territorium, fra bjørner som stjeler pikniken til pumaer som jager joggere. På veien lærer vi også hvordan vi skal holde oss unna gretne bisonokser og hvorfor det er lurt å dukke når rådyr dukker opp.

programme.title: Alaskas dødeligste: Rovdyret raser
programme.desc: De farligste rovdyrene i Alaska kjemper for å overleve i en av USAs siste grenseland. På vinteren strides kjøtteterne i Alaskas vannkilder og på åpne sletter for å dra nytte av solen. Ved kysten skaper det åpne havet store muligheter for enorme jegere som spekkhuggere, makrellhaier og hvalrosser. Lengre inn i landet jakter jerven på byttene med stor intensitet. Bjørnene forsyner seg av havrovdyrenes bytter langs kysten og i vannløpene.

programme.title: Race to Winter
programme.desc: Når vårens første lys glir over fjordene, skogene, fjellene og tundraen, starter den store oppvåkningen.
